extensionDescription.message: Protects GitHub search during translation and repairs risky components in open Shadow DOM or same-origin frames on authorized sites.

fallbackNotice.message: Native search did not open reliably. Compatibility search is active.

fallbackHint.message: Enter to search · Esc to close

siteGuardBuiltInActive.message: GitHub's built-in search protection is active.

siteGuardReloadHint.message: Reload the page after enabling protection or changing rules.

siteGuardFrameCount.message: Protection is active in $COUNT$ same-origin frames.

siteGuardObservedRisks.message: $COUNT$ recent risky DOM rewrite(s) were observed. Review suggested components.

siteGuardHealthAllHealthy.message: All component rules are active on this page.

siteGuardHealthAmbiguous.message: More than one matching component was found.

siteGuardHealthWeak.message: This older rule lacks enough identity data for automatic repair.

siteGuardHealthUnavailable.message: Reload this page to inspect the rule.

siteGuardClearConfirm.message: Clear all component rules for this site?

pickerInstruction.message: Hover a component, then click it to select its protection boundary.

pickerRepairInstruction.message: Select the replacement boundary for this unresolved rule.

pickerSelected.message: Component selected. Confirm it or choose its parent.

pickerSuggested.message: Suggested high-risk component $INDEX$ of $TOTAL$ (score $SCORE$). Confirm it or inspect another candidate.

pickerObservedSuggestion.message: Recent DOM text rewriting was observed in component $INDEX$ of $TOTAL$ (score $SCORE$). Confirm it or inspect another candidate.

pickerSaved.message: Protection saved. Reload after enabling page translation.

pickerError.message: The component rule could not be saved.
